$description: Machine-legible typographic contract. Measure is expressed in ch (a typographic law constant); the heading map references semantic type styles.

measure.$description: Target line length for running text, in characters.

rules: Heading level is chosen by document structure, not by desired size.
Running text is capped at the measure.max; it is never allowed to run edge-to-edge.
Type styles are used whole; their line-height and tracking are not overridden.
